targets.rawSql: SELECT count(*) AS ticks FROM delta.market.silver_market_ticks WHERE event_time > current_timestamp - interval '5' minute
SELECT count(distinct symbol) AS symbols FROM delta.market.silver_market_ticks WHERE event_time > current_timestamp - interval '5' minute

SELECT window_start AS time, symbol AS metric, close AS value FROM delta.market.gold_ohlc_1min WHERE window_start > current_timestamp - interval '1' hour AND symbol IN ('RELIANCE','TCS','HDFCBANK','INFY','ICICIBANK') ORDER BY window_start
SELECT sector, sum(turnover) AS turnover FROM delta.market.gold_ohlc_1min WHERE window_start > current_timestamp - interval '2' minute GROUP BY sector ORDER BY turnover DESC
